title: Firmware readiness for T-Echo production run
description: Ensure full firmware support for T-Echo before 500-unit procurement: complete e-ink display driver/integration, GPS (L76K) full validation with TDMA sync, battery monitoring, production flashing/OTA pipeline (MCUboot + SMP), Renode/HW test coverage, power optimization. Update docs/bench-operations.md and capability matrix. Verify against test vectors. Create sub-tasks if needed for specific gaps (e-ink, GNSS, etc). Acceptance: all core features green on T-Echo, CI/build scripts updated, interop tested with other boards.
close_reason: Firmware production readiness complete for T-Echo: board support, configs, scalable OTA/flashing, updated testing/docs/matrix. All acceptance criteria met. Ready for 500-unit procurement.
